long_description:
## Overview

Production-ready Email Validation API that checks format (RFC 5322), MX records, disposable domains (500+), free providers, and role-based addresses — all without sending any emails. Powered by Cloudflare Workers for ultra-low latency worldwide.

## Key Features

- ✅ RFC 5322 format validation with detailed error messages
- ✅ MX record verification for deliverability checking
- ✅ Disposable/temporary email detection (500+ domains)
- ✅ Typo correction suggestions (e.g., gmial.com → gmail.com)
- ✅ Bulk validation of up to 50 emails per request (Pro+)

## Use Cases

- **SaaS Signups**: Block disposable emails and validate format at registration
- **Email Marketing**: Clean your mailing list before sending campaigns
- **E-commerce**: Reduce failed order confirmation emails
- **Lead Generation**: Ensure collected emails are valid and deliverable
- **CRM Data Quality**: Periodic list hygiene and deduplication

## Quick Start

```
GET /validate?email=user@example.com
```

Returns JSON with `is_valid`, `is_disposable`, `has_mx`, `suggestion`, and more.

## Pricing

| Plan | Price | Requests/mo | Rate Limit |
|------|-------|-------------|------------|
| **Basic (FREE)** | $0 | 500 | 1/sec |
| Pro | $9.99 | 50,000 | 10/sec |
| Ultra | $29.99 | 500,000 | 50/sec |

Free tier includes all validation checks. No credit card required.
